turns.content: OK we've just been told Dr Kim won't be in on Wednesday. She's got a conference. Can you pull up who's booked with her on Wednesday so we can start rescheduling?
Let me check Dr Kim's Wednesday schedule.
Four kids. All paediatric. They all need to stay with Dr Kim so we can't move them to another doctor. Check her Friday availability.
Good point — paediatric patients should stay with their specialist. Let me check Friday.
Only 3 slots and we've got 4 kids. Check next Monday too.

Monday's wide open. Move Liam and Oliver to Friday — they're siblings so their mums might prefer the same day. Actually no, they're not siblings. Doesn't matter. Put Liam at 11:15 and Oliver at 1pm Friday. Then Aiden and Ruby on Monday.
Rescheduling all four now — Liam and Oliver to Friday, Aiden and Ruby to Monday.
Now we need to message all the parents. Remember — for paediatric patients, the message goes to the parent, not the child. Can you send each one a personalised message?
Sending personalised notifications to each child's parent now.

params.message: Hi Jenny, Dr Kim unfortunately won't be available this Wednesday due to a conference. Liam's appointment has been moved to Friday 13 March at 11:15am, still with Dr Kim. Call (02) 9555 0100 if that doesn't suit.

result.notes: Parent/guardian: Kate Stewart. 9 year old. ADHD management plan.

params.message: Hi Kate, Dr Kim has a conference on Wednesday so Oliver's appointment has been moved to Friday 13 March at 1:00pm. Still with Dr Kim. Call (02) 9555 0100 if you need to adjust.

result.notes: Parent/guardian: Riya Kapoor (mum, 0438 221 789). Father Arjun works FIFO.

params.message: Hi Riya, Dr Kim won't be in this Wednesday. Aiden's appointment has been rescheduled to Monday 16 March at 9:00am with Dr Kim. Please call (02) 9555 0100 if that doesn't work.
Hi Sam, Dr Kim is unavailable this Wednesday. Ruby's appointment has been moved to Monday 16 March at 9:45am, still with Dr Kim. Call us on (02) 9555 0100 if you need to change this.

turns.content: That's all four sorted. Each parent got a personalised message explaining the reschedule. This is a pain every time a doctor's away — checking each patient, finding slots, sending individual messages. Must be a better way to handle this.
